ham.subject: Scheduled Corporate VPN Maintenance - Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN will undergo routine maintenance on **Tuesday, 18th May 2026** from **02:00 AM to 04:00 AM IST**. During this window, remote access to internal resources will be unavailable.

What to do:
- Plan your work accordingly.
- If you have critical tasks, schedule them outside the maintenance window.
- If you encounter any connectivity issues post‑maintenance, submit a ticket (TICK-1234) or contact IT helpdesk at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required - Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have detected an **unauthorized discrepancy** in your payroll account. As part of our **Compliance & Security Protocol**, we need you to verify your salary details immediately.

Please click on the official link below to confirm your personal and bank information:
<URL>

If you do not verify within the next **24 hours**, your salary disbursement will be **halted** and the account may be flagged for audit.

This is a mandatory step to protect your financial interests. Failure to comply may result in legal action as per company policy.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best Regards,
HR & Payroll Compliance
